source_refs.snippet:
commit 656cb0450aeb73b25d7d26980af342b37ac4c568
Author:     Jiasheng Jiang <jiasheng@iscas.ac.cn>
AuthorDate: Tue Feb 15 17:58:08 2022 +0800
Commit:     Peter Ross <pross@xvid.org>
CommitDate: Fri Feb 18 16:54:11 2022 +1100

    avcodec/vp3: Add missing check for av_malloc
    
    Since the av_malloc() may fail and return NULL pointer,
    it is needed that the 's->edge_emu_buffer' should be checked
    whether the new allocation is success.
    
    Fixes: d14723861b ("VP3: fix decoding of vid

content.stdout_excerpt:
commit 656cb0450aeb73b25d7d26980af342b37ac4c568
Author: Jiasheng Jiang <jiasheng@iscas.ac.cn>
Date:   Tue Feb 15 17:58:08 2022 +0800

    avcodec/vp3: Add missing check for av_malloc
    
    Since the av_malloc() may fail and return NULL pointer,
    it is needed that the 's->edge_emu_buffer' should be checked
    whether the new allocation is success.
    
    Fixes: d14723861b ("VP3: fix decoding of videos with stride > 2048")
    Reviewed-by: Peter Ross <pross@xvid.org>
    Signed-off-by: Jiasheng Jiang <jiasheng@iscas.ac.cn>

 libavcodec/vp3.c | 7 ++++++-
 1 file changed, 6 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

656cb0450a avcodec/vp3: Add missing check for av_malloc
f025b8e110 avcodec/threadframe: Add ff_thread_(get|release)_ext_buffer()
b3551b6072 avcodec/thread: Move ff_thread_(await|report)_progress to new header
46309f262c avcodec/vp3: Don't output bogus warning
96caa01f13 avcodec/vp3: Check version in all cases when VP4 code is not built

content.claim: git log --follow around changed path libavcodec/vp3.c
content.snippet:
656cb0450a avcodec/vp3: Add missing check for av_malloc
f025b8e110 avcodec/threadframe: Add ff_thread_(get|release)_ext_buffer()
b3551b6072 avcodec/thread: Move ff_thread_(await|report)_progress to new header
46309f262c avcodec/vp3: Don't output bogus warning
96caa01f13 avcodec/vp3: Check version in all cases when VP4 code is not built

content.description: Missing NULL check for `s->edge_emu_buffer` after `av_malloc` call on line 2683 (old line number), leading to a potential NULL pointer dereference.
Added NULL check for `s->edge_emu_buffer` after `av_malloc` call and introduced error handling by jumping to the `error` label if allocation fails.

content.summary: The root cause is a missing NULL check after `av_malloc` for `s->edge_emu_buffer` in the `vp3_decode_frame` function, which could lead to a NULL pointer dereference if `av_malloc` fails. The fix adds the necessary check and error handling.
